case_title: TONG, ANNIE VS THE CITY TOW

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,835.27 FILED BY TONG, ANNIE AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TONG, ANNIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $920.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TONG, ANNIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $950.00, THE JUDGMENT IS AMENDED NUNC PRO TUNC TO 8/10/99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLTF' CORRESPONDENCE INQUIRING ABOUT COSTS FOR SERVICE W/COPY OF POS ATTACHED; FRWRDED.TO 506;
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW
